<?php

/**
 * @file
 * Fixture: rendering $build during preprocess MUST be flagged.
 */

function my_module_preprocess_node(array &$variables): void {
  $build = $variables['content'];
  // Rendering inside preprocess loses bubbled cacheability metadata.
  $variables['content_html'] = \Drupal::service('renderer')->render($build);
}
